metadata.title: Tokenz
metadata.description: Insert shortcodes into your document, e.g smileys :) or emojis :wink: . User-defined short code maps are also supported.

regex.target: .log("代码地图列表已加载，正在处理...")

regex.source: .setDesc("While typing: If enabled, a dropdown list will appear showing the actually matching tokens, if there's any.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在输入时：如果启用，将显示一个下拉列表，显示实际匹配的标记，如果有的话。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Replace the selected token with its matching icon. If enabled, the choosed token's icon will be inserted directly into the text instead of the the token's name.")
regex.target: .setDesc("将选定的标记替换为相应的图标。如果启用了该功能，所选标记的图标将直接插入到文本中，而不是标记的名称。")

regex.source: .setDesc('Only available when "Show suggestions dropdown list" is enabled')
regex.target: .setDesc('仅当“显示建议下拉列表”启用时可用')

regex.source: .setDesc("Maximum number of suggestions to show in the dropdown list (per group; per code map)")
regex.target: .setDesc("在下拉列表中显示的建议的最大数量（每个组；每个代码地图）")

regex.source: currentModeDesc = 'Completion (Suggested): Highlight if the current word is the beginning of a token. E.g. ":smi" matches ":smile:"';
regex.target: currentModeDesc = '完成（建议）：如果当前单词是标记的开头，请高亮显示。例如，":smi" 匹配 ":smile:"';
